textByHash.c4f94321f5832be865e48fcf3efb0550708a5797: Ignisia claims it's some kind of evil spirit.
textByHash.b38dc4c89ceed4d7162041468fc3d4482b97d418: Nah, I believe in things I can stab and kill. This is all just a storm in a teacup. I mean, how can wind and snow be evil? My toad is more of a threat!
textByHash.ff5deaf86e989796e752e88537fed3a67c570082: Yeah, just a bit of fun. I have a pet - he's around here somewhere, assuming that troublesome cat hasn't eaten him.
textByHash.b78ad59f548dc76e5c5790ec731c12c8127ad36e: No weirder than being scared of snow.
textByHash.c6f8fce605b0b064205ccff4da9f026834afc94c: I'm Captain Kalt, proud member of the Shayzien Army.
textByHash.5cefcfd2e51fc11ec05fdb6794216ad1fcb2358d: Man and boy I've worn the uniform. Earned Captain a few years back and never looked back. Not too happy about babysitting delusional wizards though. But orders is orders.
textByHash.0a8a2e67b28b47dc23a0d6c6adb400b052071ce1: Go play in the snow and come back when you've done something.
textByHash.bc80b2c46fac0f74445f7048195b99d7e892fbc0: You appear to have tried a little.
textByHash.a18cb3cd4f3c7dd3d21e09b83fa1c2809c2f060f: Ignisia appears to be quite happy with you.
